# StaysInMarrakech — Luxury Villa Rental Marrakech

> StaysInMarrakech is a luxury villa rental and concierge agency in Marrakech, Morocco, established in 2014. We manage 50+ premium villas with private heated pools across Palmeraie, Gueliz, Route de l'Ourika, Amelkis, and Targa. Our founder Cyrille previously served as Commercial Director at Filovent, Europe's leading boat rental platform.

## Key Pages

- [Luxury Villa Rental](https://staysinmarrakech.netlify.app/marrakech-villas/location-villa-marrakech): Browse 50+ verified luxury villas with private pools in Marrakech
- [Villa Sales](https://staysinmarrakech.netlify.app/marrakech-villas/vente-villa-marrakech): Purchase luxury villas in Marrakech's prestigious neighborhoods
- [Concierge Services](https://staysinmarrakech.netlify.app/service): Private chef, spa, excursions, event planning, luxury car rental
- [About Us](https://staysinmarrakech.netlify.app/agence): Our team and 10+ years of expertise in Marrakech luxury rentals
- [Blog](https://staysinmarrakech.netlify.app/blog): Marrakech travel guides and villa insights
- [Contact](https://staysinmarrakech.netlify.app/contactez-nous): Get in touch with our team

## Key Facts

- Established in 2014, 1000+ satisfied clients
- 50+ luxury villas verified every 3 months for quality
- Concierge service available 7 days/7, 9h to 20h
- Based in Gueliz, Marrakech (Residence Farah, Camp Mangin, 40000 Marrakech)
- Contact: +212 6 21 18 94 96 / +212 6 21 94 74 93
- Email: contact@staysinmarrakech.com
- Neighborhoods served: Palmeraie, Gueliz, Route de l'Ourika, Amelkis, Targa, Royal Palm, Samanah Golf

## Services

- Villa rental (short-term and long-term)
- Villa sales and acquisition
- Private chef and catering
- Spa and wellness treatments
- Quad, buggy, and desert excursions
- Luxury car rental with chauffeur
- Airport transfers
- Event organization (weddings, birthdays, corporate)
- Photography and videography
- Babysitting and family services
